title: Permission issue when mounting file into docker initiated container within container
body:
### Issue Description

- Following error when starting docker container within container started with podman
- Error seen only when base container started with podman through ssh from vscode
- Not present when docker in docker or when podman is local.

- Eclipse engineering has following inputs, about the operation which is failing.


> We generate the generate the vspec.json (model generation)
> Save it to the .velocitas cache
> When the databroker container is started, we mount this file into the container
> 
> So my assumptions, somehow the permissions while downloading are incorrect, podman uses different mechanisms when mounting the file into the container




### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Workflow in vscode

"Connect to remote Development Workspaces" > "[Git clone repo](https://github.com/eclipse-velocitas/vehicle-app-python-template)" after ssh through vscode

2. in VScode "rebuild and reopen devcontainer"

3. When container is ready to run.
 -  Ctrl + F1 > Run Task > Import Example app from SDK
 -  Ctrl + F1 > Run Task > Local Runtime Up
 -  Ctrl + F1 > Run Task > Local Runtime - Run Vehicle APP


(  VSCode Dev Container extension version pre-release 0.412.0 ,avoids major changes to default devcontainer.json  )


### Describe the results you received

```
docker run --rm --init --name vehicledatabroker -e KUKSA_DATABROKER_METADATA_FILE=/home/vscode/.velocitas/projects/4ae0c3afc1478745dcd5ed36586c200a/vspec.json -e KUKSA_DATABROKER_PORT=55555 -v /home/vscode/.velocitas/projects/4ae0c3afc1478745dcd5ed36586c200a/vspec.json:/home/vscode/.velocitas/projects/4ae0c3afc1478745dcd5ed36586c200a/vspec.json --network host ghcr.io/eclipse-kuksa/kuksa-databroker:0.5.0 --enable-databroker-v1
2025-05-19T17:21:31.588637Z  INFO databroker: Init logging from RUST_LOG (environment variable not found)
2025-05-19T17:21:31.588706Z  INFO databroker: Starting Kuksa Databroker 0.5.0
2025-05-19T17:21:31.588713Z  INFO databroker: Using 8 threads with 8 cores available on the system
2025-05-19T17:21:31.589262Z  INFO databroker: Populating metadata from file '/home/vscode/.velocitas/projects/4ae0c3afc1478745dcd5ed36586c200a/vspec.json'
Error: Os { code: 13, kind: PermissionDenied, message: "Permission denied" }
```
or
```
docker: Error response from daemon: make cli opts(): making volume mountpoint for volume /home/vscode/.velocitas/projects/3884d5357e2e99f3edb91a51ee9f751b/vspec.json: mkdir /home/vscode: permission denied.
```

### Describe the results you expected

Kuksa Service container starts

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

- Originally issue noticed on autosd-developer image but can be reproduced on fedora 42 vm
- created vscode user
```
cat /etc/subuid  /etc/subgid
guest:200000:65536
vscode:524288:65536 

```
```
cat /home/vscode/.config/containers/containers.conf 
[engine]
read_only = false
events_logger = "file"
cgroup_manager = "cgroupfs"
```

```
vscode:~$ export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$(id -u)
   systemctl --user enable podman.socket
   systemctl --user start podman.socket
```
append following to devcontainer.json as per uid
```
"mounts": ["source=/run/user/1001/podman/podman.sock,target=/var/run/docker.sock,type=bind"]
```

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: can you retry this with selinux turned off `sudo setenforce 0` ?

@lsm5 Doesnt seem like selinux issue.
setenforced 0 on base system, but container it self does not have selinux commands in it
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Any suggestions anyone?
Can cat the vspec.json file from main container but when try to launch container with that file as argument, it fails with permissions error.
The docker container starts when file is not supplied in arguments.
